subject: React shell live session refresh
fact: ClaudeVilleApp now derives agents, buildings, and selectedAgent from the mutable world object during render, so the sidebar/dashboard/activity panel stay in sync even if the cached controller snapshot arrays lag behind world updates.
reason: This is a useful future debugging and code review note for React shell work because it explains why the shell now reads live world collections instead of only cached snapshot arrays, and it documents the browser regression that covers live snapshot refreshes.
